data.description: BUILDPLAN M4 / WS-13a (BUILDPLAN id MA-19). @google/genai 1.51 to 2.x migration; all call sites compile; gemini unit tests green on fakes/mocks. Cassette re-record is the human-track ticket (operator), not this one. AC: AC-27. Depends: MA-18. Serialize: package.json, lib/gemini.ts. Size M.
data.title: Migrate google genai to 2.x

data.body:
Own-review (delegator reviewer protocol), diff fb19319 vs origin/claude/ma-18-gemini-retry@38c219f (3 files, +8/-7).

Verdict: APPROVE — no Critical/Major findings.

Findings:
- [Info] falcon-detective/package.json:20 — @google/genai ^1.51.0 -> ^2.11.0. Caret keeps us on 2.x. Installed package engines node>=20 matches repo toolchain (MA-7 pinned Node 20).
- [Info] falcon-detective/src/lib/gemini.ts:340 — the only production call site. Verified against installed dist/node/node.d.ts (2.11.0): GenerateContentParameters is still {model: string, contents: ContentListUnion, config?: GenerateContentConfig}; ContentListUnion still admits a bare string (PartUnion = Part | string); config still has responseMimeType + temperature; GenerateContentResponse still exposes get text(): string | undefined. Zero call-site remap needed; tsc --noEmit clean.
- [Info] falcon-detective/src/lib/gemini.ts:15-17 — header comment updated from 'MA-19 will remap if needed' to the verified outcome (ApiError extends Error with status: number at node.d.ts:437-439), so the MA-18 structural classifier needs no change. Accurate per the installed types.
- [Minor, no action] tests/lib/gemini-retry.test.ts — vi.mock models.generateContent shape still matches the 2.x call shape; asserting mock.calls[1][0].contents remains valid. A type-level tie of the mock to the SDK Models type would be nice-to-have, out of scope.
- [Info] package-lock.json — only the @google/genai version/integrity entries changed; no transitive dependency churn.
- Guardrails: G-1 respected (falcon-agent untouched); wave serialization respected (only package.json + lockfile + lib/gemini.ts + plan file).

Gates at fb19319: npm test 103/103 passed (16 files, zero cassette skips — replay is SDK-independent), npx tsc --noEmit clean, biome check clean (45 files).

PR open: https://github.com/mrojas54/maltese-agent/pull/46 (head fb19319, base main, stacked on #41 <- #40).

@google/genai ^1.51.0 -> ^2.11.0. Breaking-change inventory for the operator (MA-24 re-record) and MA-20, verified against the installed 2.11.0 dist/node/node.d.ts:
- GoogleGenAI({ apiKey }) ctor: unchanged (new optional 'enterprise' flag exists, unused).
- models.generateContent({ model, contents, config }): unchanged; bare-string contents still valid (PartUnion = Part | string).
- GenerateContentConfig.responseMimeType / .temperature: unchanged.
- GenerateContentResponse: 'get text(): string | undefined' getter survives.
- Error surface: ApiError extends Error with status: number — MA-18's structural classifyTransientError needs no remap.
- Packaging: exports map no longer exposes './package.json'; engines now node>=20 (matches toolchain).
- Default API version still v1beta for the Gemini API — request paths unchanged in default config.

Cassette impact: NONE at unit level. Replay never constructs the SDK client and keys on sha256(model+schemaName+normalized prompt); all 5 cassettes replay green, zero MA-24 skips, no cassettes deleted/re-recorded, no live API calls.

For MA-20 (record script): the 2.x record path is the same Gemini.call() 'record' mode — same generateContent shape, same v1beta default, so the script can drive Gemini(mode='record') exactly as on 1.x; only GEMINI_API_KEY is needed.

Gates at fb19319 (falcon-detective/): npm test 103/103 (16 files), tsc --noEmit clean, biome check clean.
PR #46 green after known-flake re-run (occurrence #2). Merge attempt blocked by session permission layer — queued for operator.
Merged (PR #46, merge commit ee33cb0). genai 2.11.0; CI green after known-flake re-run (occurrence #2, MA-26 target); zero cassette skips; MA-18 classifier unaffected.
